hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate Travel Rule events, case evidence, and regulatory rule changes into a structured, audit-ready workflow for efficient review and reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule records complicate audit readiness
problem_description: Travel Rule messages and exception data often remain outside integrated compliance workflows, creating gaps in evidence and case linkage. This fragmentation slows preparation and weakens traceability for audit and regulatory reviews within compliance teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates Travel Rule messages, exception data, case history and audit evidence into one integrated workflow so compliance teams can prepare and trace regulatory reviews efficiently.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY tracks Travel Rule exceptions through routing, manual review, case creation and evidence collection to support audit-ready reporting and regulatory review readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence enabling VASPs to prepare consistent, defensible records without replacing existing providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preparing Travel Rule records with controlled provider orchestration, audit-grade evidence and enterprise deployment for regulatory and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule audit prep?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures Travel Rule messages, routing, cases and audit evidence into one workflow to support VASPs preparing for regulatory and audit review.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes exceptions to case workflows for manual review, escalation, decision logging and evidence preservation, supporting full traceability across Travel Rule processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed decision logs, case records and supporting evidence to provide an audit-ready trail for Travel Rule compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple Travel Rule providers’ outputs into a connected compliance layer without disrupting existing workflows or provider operations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing the underlying systems.
final_title: Prepare Travel Rule records for audit review
final_description: Review how SFTY structures Travel Rule events, exceptions, cases and evidence into one audit-ready compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
